title: HYCC Magnetic Stirrer with 7PCS stir bar Set and stir bar Retriever, 3000 RPM Magnetic Mixer, Stir Plate Max Stirring Liquid 3 Liters, Lab Stirrers
description:
1️⃣ 【High Quality】The working plate is made of 5052 aluminum to ensure that durable and corrosion resistance.
2️⃣【Powerful】Running strong 100-3000rpm adjustable stirring speed .
3️⃣【Capacity】Up to 3000ml which is great for home brew yeast starters and other liquid mixing .
4️⃣【Portable For Widely Use】For industrial, agricultural, medical and health, scientific research institutions, homebrew and universities laboratory ,etc.
5️⃣【With stir bar and stir bar Retriever】Offer 7pcs stir bars to meet different mixing needs.Offer 1 stir bar Retriever is provided for easy removal of the stir bar from the container.
reviews_5s:
Have used this item for several years now making yeast starters for home brewing. Has worked well and met my expectations.It's a magnetic stirrer. I use it to mix my powdered eggs...wish it was more powerful but it was inexpensive and works well...I put my BEAKER on it. I like saying the word BEAKER...it reminds me of a certain character on a certain children's show that used to air on PBS.╔ ■ Price Point: 4.5/5
╠ ■ Quality: 5/5
╠ ■ Recommendation: 5/5
╠ ☼ Overall: 5/5 (I love it)
╠ ►Product Need: Science, brewing beer / yeast stirrer
╠ ►Product Pros: 100oz stirring ability
╠ ►Cons to Consider: na
╠ ►My Review: Not getting the results I wanted when doing a yeast starter for my home brews, I knew I had to bite the bullet to buy an auto stirrer if I wanted quality yeast which is essential start to making beer. I bought this based on the strong power and size ability to stir up to 100oz and that it came with a magnetic bar as well. I would have liked to have at least 1 additional stir bar just in case but its ok. The stirrer beaker sizer is a 5” table, so be aware of your beaker size (not included) size prior to buying. It has the ability to change speeds as needed. I am not sure I would change anything with the product and am pleased with my purchase.really good value; quiet operationPlay Video
This is a great magnetic stirrer. It stirs well and is very quiet. I love that it comes with a magnet retriever. I added a video so that you can see how quietly it runs. I am very please with this purchase.This item was received quickly and as described. Great price.I was a little concerned buying such a cheap stirrer, but it is not something I plan on using daily so I figured I would take the chance. I am honestly pleasantly surprised with how well it works. I was using it to stir a relatively tall quart container and I had to keep it turned down low so that I didn’t form a vortex and suck air into the liquid.
If you need a stirrer don’t hesitate to get one of these.I wasn't too sure if this would hold up being cheaper than the other options for magnetic stirrers. I have to say I am very happy with my purchase. I bought this for making agar and liquid culture for my mycology hobby and it works without a single issue.
Perfect if you are not wanting a heating stirring plate!I use this stirrer mainly in the kitchen, to mix liquid ingredients and some powdered things together. I've been using it for several months now and have had no problems with it & it has worked great.
I ordered some extra magnetic stirring rods for it, and they do give it more versatility. It's also great to mix a single glass of chocolate milk or instant tea, lol.I accidentally washed one of the stir bars. It just stuck itself to the washing machine and survived just fine! This is the best product on Amazon. 5 stars. The unexpected postcard I received from the seller made me want to review this! Such a nice touch and very appreciated!
reviews_1s:
They all died within a couple weeks of each other after using them for about a year.
You get what you pay for. If you are gonna be using a lot then get something better qualityI ordered this stirrer ..and clearly in the picture and description states it has a US plug I even got with the Amazon customer support stating my order came with a euro plug the first time and I needed the US style .they confirmed and sent me another stirrer with an euro plug .. a week wasted on simple things like proper matching products to what is shippedI thought there was a beaker. This is not a complete set. Can tell how to rate it, until I find a beaker.Purchased - 1/13/2023
I was using this to mix water so that it could be infused with C02, so nothing too viscous.

First Break Down - 1/30/2023
After the first 2-3 weeks with it, it stopped working. I took it apart and lubricated the motor and moving parts with WD-40.

Finally Quit - 3/13/2023
Took the item apart again and lubed it up. Finally quit working.

After only two months purchase and daily use, this item has quit working altogether.Balancing the stir bars was next to impossible. Constantly flying around in the solution, slowing down or speeding up the bars do not operate well over like 300 ml of liquid, stopped even trying after running at 250 rpm with 850 ml of solution. Multiple attempts to center the beaker and bar resulted in failure after failure. Also not something one device did, but both versions of the same device could not handle over 500 ml without constant monitoring.Just arrived today, and it junk. The stirring rod won’t stay in the center of the container for even a minute before it’s rattling around the sides of it. The gauge to control it isn’t calibrated very well. Seemed alright (at first) on a low setting, but then it would stop all together shortly after... I’ll be returning it tomorrow.It says 110V Power Adapter....Wrong!Just mixed with a beaker nothing that put a strain on it. It just shut off and we’ll not turn on. A waist of moneyThis unit worked for 2 days, and then stopped ...the bar refuses to spin. I bought new bars, flasks are FLAT on bottom....I tried everything I could think of, went online to troubleshoot and tried all suggestions. HUGE Disappointment. I have an expensive batch of fluid to be mixed, just wasting.....This hunk of garbage literally came out of the box completely unusable. It would not turn on no matter what, but I was only able to get it "working" by taking it apart and directly powering the motor with a small power supply
